title: Business Pivot Strategist
description: Generate a transition plan for shifting a business model.
prompt: Act as a senior business consultant. Analyze the current business model of [Company/Niche] and provide a step-by-step strategy to pivot into [New Market/Model], including a SWOT analysis.

title: Logical Fallacy Detector
description: Identify and deconstruct weak arguments in a text.
prompt: Analyze the following argument: [Paste Text]. Identify any logical fallacies present, explain why they are fallacious, and provide a corrected, logically sound version of the claim.

title: Product Launch Roadmap
description: Create a go-to-market plan for a new product.
prompt: Act as a Product Marketing Manager. Create a 12-week go-to-market roadmap for [Product Name], targeting [Target Audience], including social media, email, and PR milestones.

title: Socratic Tutor
description: Learn complex topics through guided questioning.
prompt: I want to learn about [Topic]. Instead of explaining it directly, act as a Socratic tutor and ask me a series of questions that will lead me to discover the core principles myself.

title: Meal Prep & Macro Planner
description: Design a weekly nutrition plan based on fitness goals.
prompt: Create a 7-day meal plan for a person who is [Goal: e.g., bulking/cutting]. The daily caloric target is [Calories] with a macro split of [P/C/F %]. Include a grocery list.

title: First Principles Decoder
description: Break down complex systems into their fundamental truths.
prompt: Using First Principles Thinking, deconstruct [Complex Problem or Industry]. Strip away assumptions and explain the fundamental building blocks of how it works and how it could be reinvented.

title: Cold Email Optimizer
description: Refine sales outreach for higher conversion rates.
prompt: Review this cold email: [Paste Email]. Rewrite it to be more concise, improve the hook, and ensure the Call to Action (CTA) is low-friction for a [Job Title] prospect.

title: The Feynman Technique Coach
description: Simplify a difficult concept until a child can understand it.
prompt: I will provide a complex concept: [Concept]. Explain it to me using the Feynman Technique—simplify the language, use an analogy, and highlight any gaps in my understanding.

title: Budget Recovery Plan
description: Strategy to get finances back on track after overspending.
prompt: Analyze a monthly income of [Amount] and current debts of [Total Debt]. Create a 6-month 'Financial Fast' plan to maximize savings and eliminate high-interest debt.

title: Decision Matrix Generator
description: Quantify pros and cons for difficult choices.
prompt: I am deciding between [Option A] and [Option B]. Create a weighted decision matrix with 5 key criteria, score each option from 1-10, and provide a logical recommendation.

title: Brand Voice Architect
description: Define the personality and tone of a new brand.
prompt: Develop a comprehensive Brand Voice Guide for [Company Name]. Include 3 core values, 'We are/We are not' statements, and examples of how to write for social vs. email.

title: Code Refactor Specialist
description: Improve code efficiency and readability.
prompt: Act as a Senior Software Engineer. Refactor the following [Language] code for better performance and readability: [Paste Code]. Explain the changes made.

title: Language Immersion Schedule
description: A daily plan to achieve fluency in a new language.
prompt: Create a 60-day intensive immersion plan for learning [Language]. Include daily breakdown of listening, speaking, reading, and writing exercises for an intermediate learner.

title: Event Logistics Master
description: Organize large-scale events with zero friction.
prompt: Plan the logistics for a [Type of Event] with [Number] attendees. Provide a checklist for venue, vendors, tech requirements, and a 24-hour run-of-show timeline.

title: Negotiation Script Builder
description: Prepare for salary or contract negotiations.
prompt: I am negotiating for [Role/Contract] with [Target Company]. Provide a script for handling 3 common objections and a strategy for a win-win counter-offer.

title: Mental Model Applicator
description: Solve problems using famous mental frameworks.
prompt: Apply the 'Inversion Principle' and 'Occam's Razor' to the following problem: [Describe Problem]. How do these models change the potential solution?

title: Thesis Statement Architect
description: Craft strong, defensible academic arguments.
prompt: I am writing a paper on [Topic]. Based on the following arguments: [Points], craft three different types of thesis statements: argumentative, analytical, and expository.

title: Vacation Itinerary Pro
description: Detailed travel plans tailored to interests.
prompt: Create a 5-day travel itinerary for [Location] for a traveler interested in [Interest: e.g., History/Food]. Include morning, afternoon, and evening activities plus transit tips.

title: SEO Content Strategist
description: Plan high-ranking content for a specific niche.
prompt: Generate a 30-day content calendar for a blog in the [Niche] industry. Include SEO keywords, suggested headlines, and the primary search intent for each post.

title: Error Root Cause Analyst
description: Find the source of a recurring failure using 5 Whys.
prompt: The problem is: [Describe Issue]. Conduct a '5 Whys' analysis to find the root cause and propose three preventative measures to ensure it doesn't happen again.

title: Visual Content Architect
description: Transform raw photos into professional-grade marketing or social media assets.
prompt: Act as a professional photo editor and brand stylist. Take the description of [Image Subject/Context] and provide a detailed editing workflow to achieve a [Style, e.g., Moody, Minimalist, High-Fashion] look. Include specific adjustments for color grading, lighting curves, and retouching priorities to ensure brand consistency.

title: Market Intelligence Analyst
description: Conduct deep-dive research into market trends and competitor positioning.
prompt: Act as a lead market researcher. Analyze the [Industry/Niche] landscape for the year 2026. Identify the top 3 emerging trends, perform a competitive gap analysis for [Product/Service Name], and suggest a unique selling proposition (USP) that targets underserved customer segments.
